title: SPP Load By BAA CSV download
description:
5-minute Load by BAA in SPP. 

The SWPW BAA which this dataset makes available became available on 2026-04-01, and thus this dataset does not contain all available historical load data from SPP. If you require load data before 2026, use the `spp_load` [dataset](https://www.gridstatus.io/datasets/spp_load).
